scope: Hermetic regression baseline — no live network, no MLX model load, no sprint execution

lanes.name: PQ Export Hardening
lanes.notes: Envelope hardening, CryptoKit HPKE, seal verification. All hermetic.

lanes.name: PQ Helper Path
lanes.known_failure: TestImportTimeSafety::test_import_does_not_spawn_subprocess — test design conflates object init with module import; production code is correct
lanes.notes: Hermetic but has pre-existing test bug (F206AF test design issue, not a production regression). See REPORT_STABILIZATION_SEAL.md §2.

lanes.name: Qoder Reality
lanes.notes: Static doc scanner, 88 docs, exact 1 canonical owner per module. All hermetic. (58 collected vs 57 reported in seal — lane may have gained 1 test.)

lanes.name: Runtime Authority A/B
lanes.notes: Static AST analysis, no live imports. 9 invariants verified. All hermetic. (32 collected vs 37 reported — stabilization seal may have included other counts.)

lanes.name: Graph Authority
lanes.notes: Write path verified, reset_session confirmed, DuckDB CAPABILITY-gated. All hermetic. (19 collected vs 16 passed — discrepancy noted.)

lanes.name: M1 Memory Authority Census
lanes.notes: Static matrix scan, no model load, no runtime behavior. All hermetic. (43 collected vs 39 passed — discrepancy needs investigation.)

lanes.name: M1 Memory Harmonization
lanes.notes: Harmonization layer aware of threshold inversions. All hermetic. (10 collected vs 12 passed — discrepancy needs investigation.)

lanes.name: MLX Wired Limit Canonical
lanes.notes: F206AO IS PRESENT in test directory. F206AN report said 'pending' but actual lane exists with 9 tests collected. Status should be PRESENT — F206AO was likely completed or partially written. Needs verification run.

excluded_from_hermetic_baseline.reason: Pre-existing failure in AdaptiveSemaphore — smoke_fetch_semaphore, smoke_adaptive_semaphore, smoke_semaphore_limit; documented in F206J report; not in scope for F206AQ hermetic baseline
Blocked: production code change risk; hermetic probes validate static correctness only
Hermetic baseline does not perform live network

f206aq-hermetic.description: Hermetic static-probe baseline — no live execution

f206aq-full.description: Full regression including F206AO — F206AO is present but unverified
f206aq-full.blocked_reason: F206AO tests are present (9 collected) but unverified — needs a run to confirm status

full_regression_command: rtk proxy python -m pytest -q tests/probe_pq_export_hardening_f206ae tests/probe_pq_helper_path_f206af tests/probe_qoder_reality_f206ag tests/probe_f206ah_runtime_authority tests/probe_graph_authority_f206ai tests/probe_m1_memory_authority_f206aj tests/probe_m1_memory_harmonization_f206al

summary.note: Seal counts (191/192) from F206AN were based on F206AE/AF/AG/AH/AI/AJ/AL. Current collection shows 192 collected across 8 lanes. F206AG collected 58 vs seal 57, F206AH collected 32 vs seal 37, F206AI collected 19 vs seal 16, F206AJ collected 43 vs seal 39, F206AL collected 10 vs seal 12. Discrepancies likely from test collection vs pass counts.
